name: The Back Nine Golf | Marietta, GA
about: The Back Nine Golf in Marietta, Georgia, provides an indoor entertainment experience centered around advanced golf simulation technology. The venue features multiple simulator bays where players can experience world-famous courses or practice their skills in a comfortable, climate-controlled environment. The facility is designed to combine the serious aspects of game improvement with the social elements of dining and entertainment, making it a versatile destination for golfers and non-golfers alike. The atmosphere is geared toward social gathering, offering a space where friends, families, and colleagues can enjoy the sport year-round regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf in a climate-controlled environment
Social atmosphere with food and beverage options
Entertainment venue suitable for groups and events
Opportunity to play famous international courses
Accessible location in East Cobb / Marietta area
No weather constraints allowing for consistent play

food_and_drink.notes: Standard sim bar fare expected, though menu details are unavailable.
Alcohol service is available as inferred by the bar/lounge venue type.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience, rental clubs are typically available on site if you do not have your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are generally not permitted as the venue offers a full menu of food and beverages for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on a simulator typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the specific course selected.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a fun, accessible environment for children and juniors to try golf in a controlled setting.
